finance_snapshot.msrp: Honda Canada builder selling price shown: $35,176
finance_snapshot.total_before_tax: Honda Canada Build & Price shows $35,176 before tax, with freight, PDI, levies, and dealer fees included in the displayed selling price.
finance_snapshot.apr: Honda Canada does not expose a stable national APR in the public model-selection HTML.
finance_snapshot.finance_payment: Use the Honda Canada Build & Price payment tool for province-specific finance estimates.
finance_snapshot.finance_down_payment: Varies by province, trim, and credit profile.
finance_snapshot.lease_payment: Use the Honda Canada Build & Price payment tool for province-specific lease estimates.
finance_snapshot.due_at_signing: Varies by province, trim, and dealer.
finance_snapshot.incentives: Honda Canada's current hatchback pricing lives in the active builder; exact APR and lease ads require the payment flow.
finance_snapshot.warranty: Honda Canada's standard warranty booklet lists Honda's Five Year/100,000 km No Nonsense powertrain warranty, distributor's warranty at 3 years/60,000 km, and roadside assistance for 3 years with no distance limit. Hybrid-specific components carry additional coverage in the Honda warranty guide.
finance_snapshot.best_for: Compact-car buyers who want cargo flexibility without giving up Honda small-car dynamics.
finance_snapshot.financial_strengths: Fee-inclusive displayed price and hatch practicality make the ownership case easier to judge than on many crossovers.
finance_snapshot.financial_concerns: The original research set used a 2025 Civic Hatchback PDF, but the active Honda Canada retail flow is 2026 Civic Hatchback.
finance_snapshot.notes: Snapshot uses Honda Canada's active builder data on March 25, 2026. The current consumer flow for this nameplate is 2026 Civic Hatchback.

image_strategy.note: Dataset stores one canonical local image per vehicle.
